data.title: 'No' — Trump Shuts Down Tariff Rollback Buzz Ahead of China Talks
data.description: Trump firmly ruled out easing the 145% tariff on Chinese imports, tying any reduction to China halting fentanyl exports ahead of critical trade talks.

data.title: Can't Get Tomatoes Or Avocados Because Of Tariffs? Mark Cuban Jokes That Twinkies And Ho-Hos Made In US Bakeries Are The Perfect Replacement
Outback Steakhouse Parent Bloomin Brands Q1 Earnings: Margin Contraction, High Debt, Weak Q2 Outlook
data.description: Bloomin' Brands tops Q1 EPS and sales estimates but trims Q2 outlook amid macro pressures and margin contraction.

data.title: Here's How Much $100 Invested In Hilton Worldwide Holdings 10 Years Ago Would Be Worth Today
Long-Term Decline In Cereal Market Poses Structural Challenges For Kellogg, Analyst Says
data.description: J.P. Morgan analyst Ken Goldman rated WK Kellogg (NYSE:KLG) Neutral with a $19 price target after Q1 EPS of $0.20 missed estimates. Revenue fell short at $663M vs. $679.49M forecast. KLG cut its 2025 outlook, projecting a 2–3% drop in organic net sales and flat to lower EBITDA. Ongoing cereal category struggles, rising capex, and tariff risks justify a valuation discount, the analyst noted.
